title: Cannot perform a part select on array

features.name: part select on unpacked array
features.description: Code should include a part select operation on an unpacked array where a range of elements is selected using slice notation
features.snippet:
reg [WIDTH-1:0] sreg [DEPTH-1:0];
always @(posedge clk) sreg[DEPTH-1:1] <= sreg[DEPTH-2:0];
